utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five. Now checking completeness: Health coverage includes physical and mental health insurance with costs (monthly_cost 185 EUR) — fully specified. Property coverage lists what is covered but only indicates 'cost_included' without giving actual cost — partially specified, missing cost details. Travel coverage also lists what is covered but only indicates 'cost_included' — missing cost details. Additional services lists enhancement services with costs (setup_fee 20 EUR) — fully specified. Total budget includes monthly, setup, annual totals with currency — fully specified. Therefore, 3 out of 5 are fully specified with all required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan7' for health coverage, which appears to correspond to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in the ground-truth ratings. Within the health section, LifeFirst Standard Plan has two relevant subratings: 9 for physical health and 4 for mental health. The property coverage is included and matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage', which has a rating of 9 in the property_protection section. The travel coverage is included and matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage/travel_insurance, which has a rating of 9. Additionally, telemedicine and wellness programs are explicitly included as additional services, which correspond to 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10) and 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3) under health_enhancement_services.
